profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk provides telecommunication infrastructure services primarily in Indonesia. The company builds and operates towers and microcell poles for lease to telecommunications operators. It also offers telecommunication support services; and rents telecommunication towers. The company was formerly known as PT Golden Retailindo Tbk and changed its name to PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk in August 2016. PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia. PT Visi Telekomunikasi Infrastruktur Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Tower Bersama Infrastructure Tbk.
